title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Real Estate Agent at Cushman & Wakefield India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? Cushman & Wakefield India in Gurgaon offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Cushman & Wakefield India:
Cushman & Wakefield India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cushman & Wakefield India!
